vitals.participation_trend: stable, one of Israel's largest cycling events

course_description.overview: Mass participation road cycling event featuring 4 spectacular routes through Jerusalem's main historic attractions, surrounding nature, and scenic areas.

key_segments.name: Old City Loop
key_segments.description: Passes major landmarks including ancient walls and historic sites.

key_segments.name: Mount of Olives Climb
key_segments.description: Steep ascent with panoramic views over the city.

key_segments.name: Neveot Descent
key_segments.description: Fast downhill through surrounding hills and nature.

key_segments.name: Finish Circuit
key_segments.description: Urban return via city center highlights.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging due to Jerusalem's steep hills and urban climbs, suitable for intermediate riders with family-friendly shorter options.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Ben Gurion Airport (TLV), then bus or train to Jerusalem (45-60 min). Event starts in central Jerusalem.
logistics.accommodation: Abundant hotels and hostels in central Jerusalem near start area; book early for event weekend.
logistics.registration_details: Online via official site; English support at +972-3-5711575. Cancellation fee 5% of registration.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bring your own or rent locally; expo provides servicing. Roads closed for event.
logistics.local_considerations: Early May weather mild (20-25°C); respect cultural sites, modest dress outside event. Hebrew dominant, English widely understood.

final_verdict.one_liner: Jerusalem's iconic mass cycling celebration blending athletic challenge with historic wonders.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking cultural immersion, families with shorter routes, and large-field enthusiasts.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the unique scenery, atmosphere, and prestige as Israel's premier urban bike event.
pro_tips: Train for hills; Jerusalem's terrain is relentlessly steep.
Register early for preferred start waves.
Hydrate heavily; May sun intensifies climbs.

youtube_data.search_query: Sovev Jerusalem gran fondo cycling Jerusalem
